backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports and remove unused repository import to improve code clarity.
Extract sales summary calculation logic into a private method to allow internal reuse without transaction proxy issues.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for SalesSummaryDto, likely due to DTO refactoring to records or immutable classes.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for InvestmentRoiDto.
Remove dependency on RiskAssessmentRepository and hardcode fraud statistics to zero, decoupling analytics from the investment risk module.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for FraudStatisticsDto.
Update getRevenueAnalytics to call the new private calculateSalesSummaryInternal method instead of the public transactional method.
Update code to use direct accessor methods (e.g., totalRevenue()) instead of getter methods (getTotalRevenue()), consistent with Java Records or modern DTOs.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for RevenueAnalyticsDto.
Reorder import statements to group standard library, third-party, and project-specific imports logically.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Moved jakarta.servlet and lombok imports below springframework imports.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Add import for the new JwtPrincipal domain class used for authentication data extraction.
Update user information extraction to support both JwtPrincipal and Jwt types for compatibility.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Added instanceof check for JwtPrincipal before falling back to Jwt for userId and userName.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Update tenant ID extraction to support both JwtPrincipal and Jwt types for compatibility.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Added instanceof check for JwtPrincipal before falling back to Jwt for tenant_id.

Instantiate JwtPrincipal from JWT and populate it with extracted roles before returning the authentication token.
Replace hardcoded role string literals with constants from a dedicated SecurityRoles class to improve maintainability and consistency.
Refactor validateAndGetShop to return the Optional result directly instead of assigning to a local variable first.
Update role checks to use new constant names (e.g., SHOP_MANAGER instead of MANAGER) reflecting a domain model change.

Extract the hardcoded page size value into a named constant for better maintainability.

Add a metadata field using Hibernate's JSON type support to store flexible key-value pairs.
Add a supplier_name column to the Product entity to track the supplier's name.
Add a supplier_contact column to the Product entity to track the supplier's contact information.
Add a dimensions field to the Product entity to store product dimension details.

Replace the scalar tenant ID string with a ManyToOne relationship to a Tenant entity to enforce referential integrity.
